description: Detects weak randomness usage in C: rand(), random(), srand(time(NULL)), and memcmp/strcmp on security-sensitive data. Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes (cannot filter by function name or enclosing function name without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify rand(), random(), srand(time(NULL)) are not used in security-sensitive contexts; use a CSPRNG instead. Also verify memcmp/strcmp is not used on secrets (timing side-channel risk).
